requirement.description: If vehicle speed is greater than zero and any door transitions from closed to open, the system shall activate the door-open warning within the same communication cycle.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorOpenWarn activates in the same cycle when front-left door transitions from closed to open while speed > 0.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorOpenWarn = 1 in the same communication cycle
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s15_001(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GATEWAY_WARNINGS, CAPTURE_WINDOW_SEC)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_door_open_warn(msgs[0]) == 1

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorOpenWarn activates when multiple doors transition simultaneously while speed > 0.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorOpenWarn = 1 without delay or missing cycle

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorOpenWarn does not activate if door opens when vehicle speed = 0.
Verify DoorOpenWarn activates only once per cycle and not delayed to the next cycle.
test_steps: Observe first Gateway_Warnings frame after transition
test_cases.expected_result: DoorOpenWarn asserted in the same CAN frame cycle
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s15_007(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GATEWAY_WARNINGS, CAPTURE_WINDOW_SEC)
    assert len(msgs) >= 1
    assert decode_door_open_warn(msgs[0]) == 1
